name: Jonathan Harvey's Aunt Katie's Best of the West Coconut .
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cream together butter and sugars until well combined.
3. Add eggs and egg white, vanilla; mix thoroughly.
4. Sift flour with baking soda into a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the sifted flour mixture to the butter mixture, mixing after each addition.
6. Fold in chocolate mint chips and semi-sweet chocolate chips.
7. Stir in coconut until evenly distributed.
8. Shape dough into cookies and bake for 9-12 minutes, or until golden brown.
